We have a weekly At-Home curriculum that you can use to learn with your family

1
Get a weekly agenda of topics, news, and educational videos on the latest scams and how to avoid them
2
Receive a structured program outlining how to set up your weekly family financial literacy workshops
3
Learn to make better financial decisions by consulting with experts and joining support groups
4
Seeking Support and Making Informed Decisions
